title: Build Any Word

alam_mo_ba: You now have the tools to decode words you've never studied. Next time you hear your lola speak, listen for the roots underneath the affixes. The grammar you just learned has been there your whole life — you just didn't have the key.
completion_reward.alam_mo_ba_display: Show 1 random fun fact on lesson completion screen.

progress_ring.display: Ring animates from X/5 to (X+1)/5 on session completion
